mapper.sql: select d.detail_id, d.delivery_id, d.order_detail_id, d.zs_order_detail_id, d.material_id, d.material_code, d.material_name, d.specification, d.model, d.unit, d.remaining_quantity, d.delivery_quantity, d.price, d.amount, d.pack_coefficient, d.batch_no, d.main_barcode, d.aux_barcode, d.production_date, d.expire_date, d.manufacturer_name, d.register_no, del.delivery_no from scm_delivery_detail d left join scm_delivery del on d.delivery_id = del.delivery_id

select d.detail_id, d.delivery_id, d.order_detail_id, d.zs_order_detail_id, d.material_id, d.material_code, d.material_name, d.specification, d.model, d.unit, d.remaining_quantity, d.delivery_quantity, d.price, d.amount, d.pack_coefficient, d.batch_no, d.main_barcode, d.aux_barcode, d.production_date, d.expire_date, d.manufacturer_name, d.register_no, del.delivery_no, del.audit_status as delivery_audit_status, del.order_id as ref_order_id, del.order_no as ref_order_no, del.zs_order_id as ref_zs_order_id, sod.order_quantity as ref_order_line_qty, sod.material_code as ref_order_material_code, sod.material_name as ref_order_material_name, ztd.sl as ref_zs_line_qty, ztd.code as ref_zs_material_code, ztd.name as ref_zs_material_name from scm_delivery_detail d left join scm_delivery del on d.delivery_id = del.delivery_id left join scm_order_detail sod on sod.detail_id = d.order_detail_id left join zs_tp_order_detail ztd on ztd.id = d.zs_order_detail_id
mapper.insert: insert into scm_delivery_detail( delivery_id, order_detail_id, zs_order_detail_id, material_id, material_code, material_name, specification, model, unit, remaining_quantity, delivery_quantity, price, amount, pack_coefficient, batch_no, main_barcode, aux_barcode, production_date, expire_date, manufacturer_name, register_no, create_time )values( #{deliveryId}, #{orderDetailId}, #{zsOrderDetailId}, #{materialId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialName}, #{specification}, #{model}, #{unit}, #{remainingQuantity}, #{deliveryQuantity}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{packCoefficient}, #{batchNo}, #{mainBarcode}, #{auxBarcode}, #{productionDate}, #{expireDate}, #{manufacturer}, #{registerNo}, sysdate() )

insert into scm_delivery_detail(delivery_id, order_detail_id, material_id, zs_order_detail_id, material_code, material_name, specification, model, unit, remaining_quantity, delivery_quantity, price, amount, pack_coefficient, batch_no, main_barcode, aux_barcode, production_date, expire_date, manufacturer_name, register_no, create_time) values
(#{item.deliveryId}, #{item.orderDetailId}, #{item.materialId}, #{item.zsOrderDetailId}, #{item.materialCode}, #{item.materialName}, #{item.specification}, #{item.model}, #{item.unit}, #{item.remainingQuantity}, #{item.deliveryQuantity}, #{item.price}, #{item.amount}, #{item.packCoefficient}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.mainBarcode}, #{item.auxBarcode}, #{item.productionDate}, #{item.expireDate}, #{item.manufacturer}, #{item.registerNo}, sysdate())
mapper.delete:
delete from scm_delivery_detail where detail_id in
#{detailId}
